creator: gpejko@hotmail.com
text:
When connecting to server xchat doesnt send enough parameters for
 USER variable to server. I tried versions 1.6.4 and 1.7.1 from ports 
and problem exist in both versions. Here is output:

--- Connecting to eu.undernet.org (62.250.14.6) port 6667..
--- Connected. Now logging in..
--- AUTH :*** Looking up your hostname
--- AUTH :*** Checking Ident
--- AUTH :*** No ident response
--- AUTH :*** Found your hostname
--- USER :Not enough parameters     <-- this is the problem

Fix: 

I have to type:
/raw USER aaa aaa aaa aaa
and then the server let me in.
I know that this is not original xchat problem because I used
xchat 1.6.4 under linux and there were no problems.
How-To-Repeat: Just try to connect to any IRC server :)
